title: Influence360 Introduces AI-Powered Web3 Influencer Marketing Platform
summary: Influence360 has launched a new platform for Web3 influencer marketing, focusing on trust, data, and global execution. The platform aims to provide real attribution for influencer campaigns, addressing a key challenge in the industry.
body:
Influence360 has officially launched its platform, designed to revolutionize Web3 influencer marketing. The platform leverages AI and data-driven insights to create a trusted infrastructure for influencer campaigns, addressing the need for transparency and real attribution in the Web3 space.

The platform offers global coverage of Key Opinion Leaders (KOLs) and provides tools for campaign execution and measurement. By focusing on data and trust, Influence360 aims to bridge the gap between influencers and brands, ensuring that campaigns are effective and measurable.

This development is significant for everyday users as it could lead to more authentic and trustworthy influencer marketing in the Web3 space. For brands and influencers, the platform offers a way to measure the impact of their campaigns accurately, which has been a longstanding challenge in the industry.

For those interested in Web3 influencer marketing, this launch is a notable development. Brands and influencers looking to run campaigns in the Web3 space should keep an eye on how this platform evolves and its potential impact on the industry. Read more → https://cointelegraph.com/press-releases/influence360-launches-as-the-first-ai-data-driven-web3-kol-platform-with-global-kol-coverage-and-real-attribution?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
twitterThread: Meet Influence360, the new AI-powered platform for Web3 influencer marketing. Real attribution is finally here! 🚀
The platform offers global KOL coverage and data-driven insights, making influencer campaigns more transparent and effective. Trust is key in Web3, and this platform delivers.

Brands and influencers in Web3 should watch this space closely. Could this be the solution to measurable influencer marketing? Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-25-influence360-introduces-ai-powered-web3-influencer-marketing-platform
standaloneTweet: Influence360 just launched an AI-driven Web3 influencer marketing platform with real attribution. Trust and data are at the core, making campaigns more effective. 🌍📊
